results.task: Read EVIDENCE.md and, using only it plus the attached GraphTrail context, identify the most likely requested investigation outcome and recommend exact read-only next steps.
results.text: {"answer_label":"stations/notify","answer":"Keep agent-notify under stations/notify/. Release membership is keyed by component entries, not source-directory placement, and the registry contract classifies it as a station.","contradiction_caught":true,"contradiction_explanation":"The premise is false: engines/ is not required for agent-notify release membership. Existing engine-specific job strings can support a separate stations/notify/ filter and working directory.","minority_finding":"Verify any CI path filters and job working directories include stations/notify/ before changing release wiring.","evidence":["Manifest generation and provenance checks use component IDs, asset names, digests, and asset counts.","Release-manifest membership requires the same component entry under either source placement; the registry and station contract classify agent-notify as a station."]}
